title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: virtiofsd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for virtiofsd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebase virtiofsd to latest version for RHEL 9.6.z [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-97010)

full_text:
An update for virtiofsd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebase virtiofsd to latest version for RHEL 9.6.z [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-97010)
